scenarios.title: Agent Frameworks, Tooling, and Sandboxed LLM Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: LLM agent frameworks, browser automation agents, tool calling, graph/state runtimes, hosted or sandbox execution, MCP, CLIs, and production agent operations.
scenarios.role: Build, customize, troubleshoot, and maintain LlamaIndex Python applications and the LlamaIndex monorepo. Routes ingestion, indexing/querying, agents/workflows, structured outputs, integrations/storage, and repo-maintenance tasks.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `llama-index` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: agents and workflows, customization and structured outputs, indexing and querying, ingestion and loading, integrations and storage, and repo maintenance.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `llama-index` when the request names `llama-index`, centers on building, customize, troubleshoot, and maintain LlamaIndex Python applications and the LlamaIndex monorepo. Routes ingestion, indexing/querying, agents/workflows, structured outputs, integrations/storage, and repo-maintenance tasks to focused sub-skills, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in agent frameworks tooling and sandboxed llm workflows. Then route to agents and workflows, customization and structured outputs, indexing and querying, or ingestion and loading when those focused workflows match.

scenarios.title: Embedding Retrieval and RAG Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Embedding models, semantic or sparse search, reranking, vector or graph RAG, retrieval training, corpus indexing, RAG pipelines, vector database clients, and retrieval evaluation.
